description: Prepare a wind turbine blade for 3D printing by scaling the NREL 5MW Reference Blade project (/home/ga/Documents/sample_projects/NREL_5MW_Reference_Blade.wpa) to a tip radius of exactly 1.0 meter. Export the scaled blade geometry to /home/ga/Documents/nrel_5mw_model_1m.stl and save the scaled project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/nrel_5mw_scaled.wpa.
